signature_bank.note: Verified: filtered to OriginatingLenderCity=NEW YORK CITY, State=NY. Other Signature Banks in IL/OH/GA are different institutions.
signature_bank.context: Signature Bank collapsed March 12, 2023 with $110B in assets, the third-largest bank failure in US history. FDIC took control after a run on deposits following SVB collapse.

forgiveness_by_party.note: D-state anomalous loans forgiven at slightly higher rate (73.3% vs 70.5%). Florida and Georgia (R governors) had the lowest forgiveness rates for anomalous loans.
